storyHook: 到岗交接任务，协作完成，下班告别

narrative.when: 周二早上九点，新一周第一个工作日
narrative.where: 市中心办公室，开放工区
narrative.who: 甲（新员工）· 乙（部门同事）
narrative.method: 领任务、看文件、讨论问题、汇报进度、下班道别
narrative.event: 甲第一天独立负责一份文件，中午前要出初稿

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Morning. You are here early.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good morning. First day on my own.
turns.zh: 早上好。第一天自己干活。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is some water. New week, new start.
turns.zh: 来杯水。新的一周，新的开始。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I am a bit on edge, to be true.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No need. You will do well.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope so. What is the first thing?
turns.zh: 希望如此。第一件事是什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the paper. First writing by twelve.
turns.zh: 这份文件给你。中午前出初稿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will have a look now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Use the old paper as a guide. Any question, say so.
turns.zh: 用旧文件做参考。有问题就说。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. I will start right away.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will open it now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Take your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The numbers here seem off.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which part? Let me see.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This line, the growth rate is wrong.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, I see the error. The box is wrong.
turns.zh: 哦，我看到错误了。格子引用错了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So we put the right one in. That is fixed.
turns.zh: 那我们填上正确的。这就改好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. What about the rest of the list?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All clear. I will send it to you in a bit.
turns.zh: 都清楚了。我一会儿发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No need to be quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the first attempt. Have a look.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me go through it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The numbers all match now. Good work.
turns.zh: 数字现在都对上了。干得好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I am happy with it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You may send it to the chief now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will send it now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One minute. Let me see first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is it? Something wrong?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No. Only the day on the front page.
turns.zh: 没有。只是封面上的日子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ah, yes. That is from last seven days.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put down this day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good eye. I did not see that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All done. Ready to send now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Send it. I will say if any word comes back.
turns.zh: 发吧。有回复我会告诉你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I will go back to my table.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I have another bit of work for you after that.
turns.zh: 好。那之后我还有件事给你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is it? More numbers?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but a short list. Names and numbers.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will do it now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need to go quick. Take a rest first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get a drink first then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. The water is in the back room.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. Back in a minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No need to go quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here I am. What is the list?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A short list of new hands. Names and numbers.
turns.zh: 新员工名单，姓名和电话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it right to put them in the box?
turns.zh: 把它们放进盒子里可以吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and make a paper copy for the office wall.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do that now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good man. I will be at my table if you need me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have the list here. All names are clear.
turns.zh: 名单在我这儿。名字都清楚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now put them in the box, one by one.
turns.zh: 好。现在一个一个放进盒子里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: May I put them in order by first letter?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is best. A to end, like the book of names.
turns.zh: 对，这样最好。按字母顺序，像电话簿一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. The box is full. What now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Make a copy for the wall. Use the great printer.
turns.zh: 打印一份贴墙上。用那台大打印机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The printer has no paper. I will get more.
turns.zh: 打印机没纸了。我去拿一些来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is a box under my table. Take what you need.
turns.zh: 我桌子底下有一箱。需要多少拿多少。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. I will put the list on the wall now.
turns.zh: 拿到了。我现在就把名单贴墙上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. That is all for now. You did well today.
turns.zh: 好。暂时就这些。你今天干得不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What comes after this?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We have a meeting at 11. Get ready.
turns.zh: 十一点有个会。准备一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is the meeting about?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The new work rules. They will give a talk.
turns.zh: 新工作规章。他们会做个说明。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Should I take notes?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, please. That would be a great help.
turns.zh: 好的，麻烦了。那会帮大忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have my book here. Ready.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let us go to the room now.
turns.zh: 好。我们现在去会议室吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will come with you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: After the meeting, we can have a quick rest.
turns.zh: 开完会，我们可以小歇一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The meeting was short. How are you?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. But I have a question about the new rules.
turns.zh: 还行。不过我对新规章有个问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go on. What is the trouble?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The part about time records. Is it for all days?
turns.zh: 关于考勤那部分。是所有日子都要吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, every day. But you can do it on your little box.
turns.zh: 是的，每天。但你可以在你的小盒子上操作。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will put a note in my hand box.
turns.zh: 那就好。我在手盒里记个提醒。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Wise. Now, let us get back to your first work.
turns.zh: 聪明。现在我们继续做你的第一份工作吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I have the numbers ready for the paper.
turns.zh: 好。纸上的数字我已经准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see. Yes, these are all right. Good work.
turns.zh: 让我看看。嗯，这些都没问题。干得好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will send it now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now, let us go through the last part together.
turns.zh: 好。现在我们一起过最后一部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which part is that?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The notes at the end. They need a short statement.
turns.zh: 最后的备注。需要一段简短说明。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. What sort of statement?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just a line about the growth numbers. Keep it simple.
turns.zh: 就一行关于增长数字的。简单写。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Are numbers up from last month? Is that right to say?
turns.zh: ‘数字较上月上升’这样说可以吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is good. Put 'by about ten parts in a hundred'.
turns.zh: 可以，很好。加上‘约百分之十’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. Anything more?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. You are ready to send.
turns.zh: 没了，就这些。你可以发了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. I will send it now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. While you do that, I will get the papers for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好。你发的时候，我去准备明天的文件。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I have sent it. All done.
turns.zh: 好的。已经发了，全部搞定。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good work. First list on your own, and no trouble.
turns.zh: 干得漂亮。第一次独立做文件，没出岔子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. It was not so hard with your help.
turns.zh: 谢谢。有你帮忙，倒也不难。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will get used to it. Any questions before the end of the day?
turns.zh: 慢慢就习惯了。下班前还有问题吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I am all right. Only need to put these in order.
turns.zh: 没了，我没事。只需要把这些按顺序放好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. I will leave then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will leave. Have a rest up.
turns.zh: 我先走了。晚上好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. I will be here at nine.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. I will have tea ready.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind. I will take some sweet cakes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I like a bit of sweet with my tea.
turns.zh: 太好了。我喝茶喜欢配点甜的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Any sort you like? I will get a mix.
turns.zh: 你喜欢哪种？我买混合的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Simple ones are good. Not too sweet.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. okay in the morning.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. Well done today.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. It was a good first day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will lock up. You go on.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are you certain? I have time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. See you tomorrow. Get some rest.

storyBlurb: 新员工甲第一天独立负责文件，在同事乙的协助下紧张赶稿。从晨会到下班，协作中完成挑战，收获成长与告别。
storyScript:
【开场·到岗问候】
周二早晨九点，办公室的玻璃门被推开，甲背着双肩包走进来。工位上，乙已经泡好了茶，抬头朝他笑了笑。甲放下包，在打卡机前按了指纹，屏幕上跳出“欢迎”二字。他走到乙的桌前，乙递过来一杯温水，说：“新一周，加油。”甲点点头，心里有些紧张，但更多的是期待。

【进行·分配任务】
乙把一沓文件放到甲桌上，封面贴着黄色便签：“初稿，中午前。”甲翻开一看，是部门季度报告的数据汇总。乙解释道：“这是你第一次独立做，先看模板，有问题随时问我。”甲深吸一口气，打开电脑，开始逐页核对数字。键盘声噼里啪啦，他时不时对照屏幕上的旧文档，眉头微皱。

【进行·协作沟通】
半小时后，甲发现一组数据与上个月对不上。他拿着文件走到乙的工位，指着屏幕说：“这里，增长率好像算错了。”乙凑过来，看了几秒，恍然大悟：“哦，公式引用错了单元格。”两人一起修改，乙又教他如何用条件格式高亮异常值。甲认真记下步骤，回到座位继续。十一点，初稿完成，甲把文件发给乙审核，乙快速浏览后竖起大拇指：“没问题，可以提交了。”甲松了口气，嘴角扬起。

【收束·下班离开】
下午六点，夕阳透过百叶窗洒进工区。甲收拾好桌面，把文件归档。乙走过来，拍了拍他的肩膀：“今天干得不错，明天继续。”甲背上包，两人一起走向电梯。电梯门合上时，乙说：“以后有不懂的，随时找我。”甲笑着点头。走出大楼，晚风拂面，他回头看了一眼办公室的灯光，心里暖暖的。
